params.label: Segmentation
params.tip: The segmentation (label set) whose cells to track.

params.label: Population
params.tip: Track the whole segmentation (NONE) or only the cells of a gated flow population.

params.label: Max search radius
params.tip: Maximum distance (px) a cell may move between consecutive frames.

params.label: Allowed gaps
params.tip: Maximum number of frames a track may be missing before it is ended.

params.label: Track branching
params.tip: Allow cell division / branching hypotheses.

params.label: Minimum timepoints
params.tip: Discard tracks shorter than this many timepoints.

params.label: Accuracy
params.tip: Motion-model accuracy (scaled internally).

params.label: Prob. to assign track
params.tip: Probability of assigning a detection to an existing track.

params.label: Initial noise
params.tip: Multiplier for the motion model initial covariance (P).

params.label: Processing noise
params.tip: Multiplier for the motion model process noise (G).

params.label: Measurement noise
params.tip: Multiplier for the motion model measurement noise (R).

params.label: Distance threshold
params.tip: Hypothesis-model distance threshold (physical units).

params.label: Time threshold
params.tip: Hypothesis-model time threshold (frames).

params.label: Segmentation miss rate
params.tip: Prior probability that a cell is undetected in a frame.

params.label: Lambda link
params.tip: Hypothesis-model link-events rate.

params.label: Lambda branch
params.tip: Hypothesis-model branching-events rate.

params.label: Lambda time
params.tip: Hypothesis-model time factor.

params.label: Lambda dist
params.tip: Hypothesis-model distance factor.

params.label: Theta time
params.tip: Hypothesis-model time threshold.

params.label: Theta dist
params.tip: Hypothesis-model distance threshold.
